name: Stickers for You
short_description: This game was created for game streamers. It is nothing but pain. We do not recommend purchasing this game except for distributors. All you have to do is collect 100 stickers hidden in a closed city. But you probably won't be able to complete it alone.
detailed_description:
This game was created for game streamers.

It is nothing but pain. I do not recommend purchasing this game except for streamers.
But if you want to look for stickers with your streamer, that's a different story.

Play this game! and let them know.

  • Just collect 100 stickers
.This is a solitary game where you collect 100 stickers in a closed city.
Some of the stickers are there, some are hidden in the streets, and some you have to cross power lines to get to. They will be in places you would never expect.

Even the author had to suffer through 3 hours of pain to clear the game.

  • Let the viewers find the stickers too
.This is a game designed for distribution. It will be difficult to complete it alone.
We recommend that you try to complete the game together, sometimes with the help of your viewers.

  • Video Distribution Guidelines
.Please include the title of the game in the title of your video or stream.
Please include a link to the Steam page in the summary section or elsewhere.
